/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC  -Werror=format-security -Wextra -Winvalid-pch -fexceptions -Wall -fPIC -O2 -g -DNDEBUG -fomit-frame-pointer -ffast-math -fno-finite-math-only -shared -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/midiedit.dir/link.d -Wl,-soname,libmuse_midiedit.so -o libmuse_midiedit.so CMakeFiles/midiedit.dir/dcanvas.cpp.o CMakeFiles/midiedit.dir/dlist.cpp.o CMakeFiles/midiedit.dir/drum_ordering.cpp.o CMakeFiles/midiedit.dir/drumedit.cpp.o CMakeFiles/midiedit.dir/drummap.cpp.o CMakeFiles/midiedit.dir/ecanvas.cpp.o CMakeFiles/midiedit.dir/piano.cpp.o CMakeFiles/midiedit.dir/pianoroll.cpp.o CMakeFiles/midiedit.dir/prcanvas.cpp.o CMakeFiles/midiedit.dir/scoreedit.cpp.o CMakeFiles/midiedit.dir/moc_dcanvas.cpp.o CMakeFiles/midiedit.dir/moc_dlist.cpp.o CMakeFiles/midiedit.dir/moc_drumedit.cpp.o CMakeFiles/midiedit.dir/moc_ecanvas.cpp.o CMakeFiles/midiedit.dir/moc_piano.cpp.o CMakeFiles/midiedit.dir/moc_pianoroll.cpp.o CMakeFiles/midiedit.dir/moc_prcanvas.cpp.o CMakeFiles/midiedit.dir/moc_scoreedit.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/local/lib/muse-4.2/modules /usr/lib/libQt5UiTools.a ../ctrl/libmuse_ctrl.so ../widgets/libmuse_widgets.so ../function_dialogs/libmuse_widgets_functiondialogs.so ../libmuse_icons.so ../../libs/xml/libmuse_xml_module.so /usr/lib/libQt5UiTools.a /usr/lib//libQt5Widgets.so /usr/lib//libQt5Gui.so /usr/lib//libQt5Core.so /usr/lib//libQt5Widgets.so /usr/lib//libQt5Gui.so /usr/lib//libQt5Core.so /usr/lib/libGL.so /usr/lib/libQt5Xml.so.5.15.19 /usr/lib/libQt5Svg.so.5.15.19 /usr/lib/libQt5Widgets.so.5.15.19 /usr/lib/libQt5Gui.so.5.15.19 /usr/lib/libQt5Core.so.5.15.19
